summary: Thread Resume Export A (FR-CV-02): deterministic read-only GET /api/threads/:id/resume-export?format=json|markdown formatting saved resume fields, with eligibility gate (not_found/not_done/RESUME_NOT_MARKED/RESUME_EMPTY) single-sourced in the service; Thread resume export UI (tap-fetch JSON/Markdown preview). No LLM, no DB write, no Typst/pcli/download/score/apply, no star_task.
